mdSummary:
# Progress

Linear progress bar with determinate + indeterminate modes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/progress

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Progress | Value | `int` | `` |  |
| Progress | Max | `int` | `100` |  |
| Progress | Variant | `ProgressVariant` | `ProgressVariant.Default` |  |
| Progress | Shape | `ProgressShape` | `ProgressShape.Linear` |  |
| Progress | IsIndeterminate | `bool` | `` |  |
| Progress | ShowLabel | `bool` | `` |  |
| Progress | ShowValue | `bool` | `` |  |
| Progress | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Progress | Striped | `bool` | `` |  |
| Progress | Animated | `bool` | `` |  |
| Progress | Animation | `ProgressAnimation` | `ProgressAnimation.None` | Opt-in animation variant for the linear progress fill. None (default) leaves existing behaviour untouched. Stripe overlays translucent diagonal stripes that sweep across the bar. |
| Progress | GradientFrom | `string?` | `` |  |
| Progress | GradientTo | `string?` | `` |  |
| Progress | Size | `string` | `"Default"` |  |
| Progress | StrokeWidth | `int` | `4` |  |
| Progress | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Progress | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CircularProgress | Value | `double` | `` |  |
| CircularProgress | Max | `double` | `100` |  |
| CircularProgress | Size | `int` | `64` |  |
| CircularProgress | StrokeWidth | `int` | `4` |  |
| CircularProgress | ShowValue | `bool` | `true` |  |
| CircularProgress | Format | `string?` | `` |  |
| CircularProgress | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CircularProgress | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CircularProgress | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| StepsProgress | CurrentStep | `int` | `` |  |
| StepsProgress | Steps | `List<string>?` | `` |  |
| StepsProgress | Orientation | `string` | `"Horizontal"` |  |
| StepsProgress | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepsProgress | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (CircularProgress) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `CircularProgress`, `StepsProgress`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Progress />
```

## CSS variables

- `UI/Progress/Progress.razor`
